info.name: NME - Business Reviews API (v2)
info.description:
New for v2 — the equivalent v1 endpoints (post_review/reply_review/get_reviews in Api.php) have never worked: every query references a buisiness_id column that doesn't exist on the `reviews` table (which only has product_id — unrelated leftover e-commerce schema). Confirmed broken on production. Not touched.

This API uses a fresh `business_reviews` table properly tied to `smart_update` (business) via `business_id`. Post Review is JWT-authenticated — user_id comes from the token, not the request body, unlike v1's design which trusted a client-supplied user_id with no real auth check. One review per user per business is enforced at both the application and database level (unique key on business_id+user_id).

Admin-reply functionality (v1's reply_review) was intentionally not built for v2 — v1's admin gate was already dead code (checked an is_admin session key that's never set anywhere in the codebase), and admin actions belong in the existing admin-panel auth system, not this JWT-based mobile API.

variable.description: Obtain via api/v2/email_verify_otp — see the API v2 collection's Auth folder.

formdata.description: Required. Integer — id of the business (smart_update.id) being reviewed.

request.description: Requires Authorization: Bearer <jwt>. user_id is taken from the token, not the request body. Rejects a second review from the same user on the same business.

response.name: Invalid Rating
Missing Fields

request.description: Public — no auth needed. Returns average rating, total review count, and the full review list for a business.
